author: mark
text:
Investigation found a second defect beyond the dangling symlink: git
exports GIT_DIR/GIT_INDEX_FILE into a hook's environment, which leaked
into `cargo test` and made git-shelling tests retarget the real repo.
Fix widened to scrub git's repo-local env in scripts/pre-commit.

A pre-fix diagnostic `git hook run pre-commit` polluted the shared
repo before the env-leak was understood: 2 junk 'seed' commits on
work/bl-38c5, an 'any' branch, and user.*/commit.gpgsign written to
.git/config. All cleaned up (branch reset, 'any' deleted, config
sections removed). Concurrent deliveries cce4f6e/a70997a/b26a3c8 were
authored 't <t@e.x>' because the polluted config was live when another
agent delivered them; left as-is (not pushed to origin; rewriting
delivered main/balls-tasks history is not this task's call).

Sibling bl-1f38 owns the deeper bl-review-squash-bypasses-gates problem.

author: mark
text:
balls: pre-commit hook works in a bare hub

The bare hub had a pre-commit hook that never ran, and would corrupt
the repo if forced to. Two defects:

1. Dangling symlink. install-hooks.sh pointed .git/hooks/pre-commit at
   <git-common-dir>/../scripts/pre-commit -- the scripts/ dir of a
   presumed main checkout. A bare hub has no main checkout (scripts/
   lives only in .balls-worktrees/<id>/), so the symlink dangled and
   git ran no hook: every worktree commit bypassed the clippy /
   line-length / test / coverage gates. install-hooks.sh now installs
   a stub into the shared hooks dir that resolves the committing
   worktree at commit time and execs its own scripts/pre-commit --
   correct for bare hubs and ordinary clones, and a removed worktree
   never re-dangles it.

2. Git env leak. A hook is invoked with GIT_DIR, GIT_INDEX_FILE and
   friends exported; scripts/pre-commit ran cargo test, which
   inherited them, so git-shelling tests retargeted the real repo
   instead of their own tempdirs. scripts/pre-commit now scrubs git's
   repo-local env before running the gates.

Verified end to end: git hook run pre-commit runs clippy, line
lengths, 668 tests and 100% coverage, exit 0. Sibling of bl-1f38,
which owns the deeper bl-review-squash-bypasses-gates problem.
